If one of the horns of the Moon should appear turned down-
wards as a result of the other's elevation, it is called 'Bent'. It
would then cause famine in the country affecting even the cattle.

If the horns of the Moon should together appear like an un-
broken circle, the figure is called Kunda or Pit, It would force
the ruling chiefs to abandon their posts.
[Compare —

If the northern horn of the Moon be raised and if she be
devoid of any of the forms mentioned above, she would lead to
increase of happiness, and prosperity and to timely rains in the
country.
